description: Composition White crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck and print on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Take the cue of being stylish from lee and make your own path for others to follow. Stand out in the crowd in this white t-shirt from lee, while the cotton fabric fits well and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with slim Fit denims and funky canvas shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
